title: Pixel Consistent Mystical Agriculture
description: Makes MA crop textures Pixel Consistent (16x16)
body: This project makes Mystical Agriculture textures be 16x16, instead of the original 32x32, making it blend in with other flora like wheat, potato, etc. If requested, then I'll try to help making it work with unsupported versions, or just use my spites to make it compatible (release it and simply credit me). It's compatible with Mystical Agradditions.
